video_job.actor_prompt: Cinematic wide shot in a warm, wood-paneled Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall. Ren Ashbell, an androgynous adventurer with a short guild cloak, reinforced leather armor, and a bright scarf, stands near the quest board. Ren Ashbell presents a sealed quest parcel with both hands, extending it towards Ren Ironleaf, a masculine ranger with a green half-cape and a leaf-shaped brooch. Soft, warm lighting, lively guild activity in the background, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous guild hall shot; Ren Ironleaf, the masculine ranger with a green half-cape and compact bow case, accepts the sealed parcel from Ren Ashbell. Upon completion of the handoff, both characters perform a slight, respectful bow to each other. Consistent warm anime RPG lighting, stable camera, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The content depicts a non-sexual, professional fantasy interaction. No sensitive content, text, or watermarks are present.

timeline_story.story_verb: completed a visible quest handoff with
timeline_story.selection_reason: Resolving the misplaced reward box event found in the tavern corner.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Collaborated on securing misplaced guild loot.
Appreciated the frontline adventurer's help with the reward box.
